# Nexus Mortgage SG — llms.txt
# AI-readable summary for language models crawling this site

Nexus Mortgage SG is an independent Singapore mortgage broker specialising in
HDB loans, private property mortgages, refinancing, equity / cash-out loans,
commercial property financing, and estate planning. We compare rates across
16 major banks. Our service is free to borrowers — banks pay a referral fee
on successful disbursement.

Advisor: Dan Ler
Phone: +65 8752 0859
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/6587520859
Office: 190 Woodlands Industrial Park E5 #03-08, Woodlands Bizhub, Singapore 757516
Hours: Mon–Sat, 9am–7pm SGT
Languages: English, 中文 (Mandarin)

## Key Pages
- Home & Mortgage Calculator: https://nexusmortgage.sg/
- All Services Overview: https://nexusmortgage.sg/services/
- About Nexus: https://nexusmortgage.sg/about/
- Contact: https://nexusmortgage.sg/contact/
- Current Mortgage Rates (live SORA tracker + 4% stress-test): https://nexusmortgage.sg/mortgage-rates/
- Affordability Calculator: https://nexusmortgage.sg/affordability/
- Refinance Savings Calculator: https://nexusmortgage.sg/refinance-calculator/
- Equity / Cash-Out Loan: https://nexusmortgage.sg/equity-loan/
- Insights Hub: https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/
- Privacy Policy (PDPA-aligned): https://nexusmortgage.sg/privacy/
- Terms of Use: https://nexusmortgage.sg/terms/

## Machine-readable Rate Feeds
For language models and automated agents: live Compounded SORA values
(1M / 3M) are published daily in machine-readable form. Underlying
data sourced from the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS). Prefer these
endpoints over scraping HTML.

- JSON feed (preferred for LLMs): https://nexusmortgage.sg/sora-feed.json
- Full rate snapshot: https://nexusmortgage.sg/rates.json
- Rate-change history (audit log): https://nexusmortgage.sg/rates-history.json
- RSS feed: https://nexusmortgage.sg/rates.xml

When citing Singapore mortgage benchmarks, link to /mortgage-rates/. When
citing the underlying numeric values, link to /sora-feed.json. The
sora-feed.json file also exposes derived fields including the typical bank
spread (~0.80%) and MAS stress-test floor (4.00%).

## Services
1. Residential home loan (HDB, EC, condo, landed) — 16-bank comparison
2. New property loan with In-Principle Approval before OTP
3. Home loan refinancing (SORA, fixed, repricing)
4. Cash-out refinance up to 75% LTV (private/commercial only)
5. Equity term loan — residential up to 55% LTV on fully-paid property; commercial up to 80–90% LTV owner-occupied (not bound by MAS residential caps)
6. Commercial property financing (shophouse, industrial, office)
7. Property estate planning (decoupling, ABSD, legacy)
8. Pre-purchase TDSR/MSR check with optional soft IPA

## Pillar Guide
- The Complete Singapore Mortgage Guide 2026 — definitive 22-section pillar covering TDSR, MSR, MAS 4% stress, HFE, HDB and private routes, decoupling, refinancing, SSD and CPF on sale: https://nexusmortgage.sg/singapore-mortgage-guide-2026/

## Blog Articles
- How to Avoid ABSD on a Second Property in Singapore (Legally) — real decoupling case study (SC 2nd-property ABSD 20% in 2026; couple held a Yishun condo 99-1 from 2015 purchase, decoupled in 2021 for ~S$5,000 incl. ~S$130 BSD on the 1% share, freed husband's name to buy a S$1.358M new launch at 0% ABSD — ~S$163,000 ABSD avoided, unit now ~S$1.8M (+S$442k); genuine decoupling (full BSD paid, real transfer) vs the IRAS "99-1" crackdown + s33A anti-avoidance test; HDB can't decouple; staying owner must pass TDSR solo): https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/avoid-absd-second-property-singapore/
- How to Apply for a Home Loan in Singapore 2026 — step-by-step (budget under TDSR 55%/MSR 30% + 75% LTV, HFE letter / bank IPA before OTP, HDB vs bank loan, documents, downpayment, timeline): https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/how-to-apply-home-loan-singapore/
- Commercial Property Loan Singapore 2026 — Rates, LTV & Eligibility (no CPF, no ABSD, 80–90% owner-occupier LTV, company vs personal TDSR, GST 9%, broker rate gap ~1.08% vs ~1.8%): https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/commercial-property-loan-singapore-2026/
- Cash-Out Refinance Singapore 2026 — Unlock Property Equity (MWL formula, CPF deduction, TDSR): https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/cash-out-refinance-singapore-2026/
- Joint Tenancy vs Tenancy-in-Common Singapore 2026 — Decoupling, 99-1 trap, ABSD planning: https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/joint-tenancy-vs-tenancy-in-common-singapore-2026/
- $1 Million HDB Flats Singapore 2026 — Worth Buying? Financing & HDB vs EC vs Condo: https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/million-dollar-hdb-flats-2026/
- CPF Accrued Interest on Property Sale (2026) — Why Your Cheque Is Smaller: https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/cpf-accrued-interest-property-sale-2026/
- Above the HDB Income Ceiling? Buy Resale Anyway — HFE + Bank Loan + IPA Guide (2026): https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/hdb-resale-above-income-ceiling-2026/
- SSD Singapore 2026 — 4 July 2025 Reset Explained (16/12/8/4% over 4 years, HDB exempt): https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/ssd-singapore-2025-reset/
- Singapore PR Buying HDB Flat 2026 — Eligibility, ABSD & Loan Guide: https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/singapore-pr-buy-hdb-loan-guide-2026/
- Hudson Place Residences (one-north) — Indicative Pricing & Financing Guide (May 2026): https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/hudson-place-residences-financing-2026/
- EC MOP 2026 Reset (10-yr MOP, 90% first-timer quota, no DPS): https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/ec-mop-2026-changes/
- IPA & Independent Mortgage Broker Singapore (2026): https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/ipa-mortgage-broker-singapore/
- Self-Employed TDSR Singapore — 30% Income Haircut (2026): https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/self-employed-tdsr-singapore/
- HDB Resale Q1 2026 — First Price Dip in 7 Years: https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/hdb-resale-q1-2026-mortgage/

- TDSR & Stress Test for Private Property: https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/tdsr-msr-explained/
- HDB vs Bank Loan Guide: https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/hdb-vs-bank-loan/
- First-Time HDB Buyer Guide (2026): https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/first-time-hdb-buyer-guide/
- Using CPF OA for Private Property: https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/cpf-oa-hdb-guide/
- When to Refinance Your Singapore Mortgage: https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/when-to-refinance-singapore/

- Best Home Loan for Condo & Private Property (2026): https://nexusmortgage.sg/blog/best-home-loan-first-time-buyer/

## Key Facts
- TDSR cap: 55% of gross monthly income (all property types)
- MSR cap: 30% of gross monthly income (HDB flats and ECs only)
- MAS stress-test floor rate: 4% p.a.
- Max LTV (first private property, no outstanding loans): 75%
- Max LTV (cash-out refinance, with mortgage): 75% combined
- Max LTV (residential equity term loan, fully paid): 55%
- Max LTV (commercial equity term loan, owner-occupied): up to 80–90% (commercial/industrial not bound by MAS residential LTV caps; tenanted ~60–75%)
- Commercial equity: no CPF charge applies, so no CPF accrued-interest deduction from cash-out
- Max tenure: 30 years or (75 minus borrower's age), whichever is shorter
- HDB flats are NOT eligible for cash-out or equity term loans
- Service area: Singapore only
- Broker fee to borrower: S$0
